title: Classic Discs
description: Changes the textures of the newer Minecraft Discs to better match the originals.
body:
![Classic Discs logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0beb55245f79e7f8d9cb776e455feb724fb007c9.png)

- This pack aims to bring the original art style back to the minecraft music discs, keeping them all consistant
